title: Why cant tags be clicked to search for that tag?

posts.author: mats.svensson (Mats Svensson)
posts.cookedHtml:
I don’t understand how I am supposed to search for items with a tag.
Clicking the tag seems to assume that I want to add another tag, that makes no sense.
And if I go to the search page to search for the tag, I first have to manually copy all the words in the tag by eyeballing it and typing them in
You cant even highlight the text in the tag and copy paste it.
That is a very nearly useless implementation of tags.

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @mats.svensson !

Have you tried using the Search Everything feature?

There is a small magnifying glass on the left sidebar. When you click in there there is a topic that you can choose called “tags” and that should bring up the full list of tags that you have on your total account in alphabetical order.

Screen Shot 2022-08-04 at 7.59.55 AM1824×1462 172 KB

Hope this helps!
